implemented_capabilities.fill_vs_quote: Append-only fill_quote_comparisons compare paper fills against contemporaneous quote observations without rewriting fills or TradeOutcomes.
implemented_capabilities.latency_tracking: Observed-vs-ingested lag, response latency, total latency, and confidence impact are recorded in source_latency_samples and surfaced in operational health summaries.
implemented_capabilities.live_data_window: Append-only live_data_acceptance_windows summarize observation-only windows and fail closed when freshness, latency, route, or comparison metrics are insufficient.
implemented_capabilities.quote_capture: Observation-only quote snapshots are persisted as RawSourceEvent, normalized MarketSnapshot/evidence refs, quote_observations, and source_latency_samples.
implemented_capabilities.route_quality: Append-only route_quality_evidence records liquidity, route depth, spread, independent quote count, score, and sufficiency without executing routes.

no_live_execution_confirmation: No live execution, private-key handling, signer, swap adapter, DEX transaction construction, or real order placement was added.

release_baseline.note: No git metadata exists in this workspace; a timestamped archive baseline was created before implementation changes.

current_evidence.fill_vs_quote_comparison: No simulated fills are compared with independent contemporaneous quotes.
current_evidence.fresh_high_confidence_quote_stream: No eligible fresh market snapshot is available.
current_evidence.source_latency_distribution: No source latency samples are recorded.
current_evidence.stage2_owned_live_data_acceptance_window: No passed live data acceptance window is recorded.
